# Yongkang STWADD Houseware Co., Ltd.

> Yongkang STWADD Houseware Co., Ltd. is a manufacturer and supplier of insulated water bottles, stainless steel tumblers, wine tumbler flasks, plastic water bottles, and hip flasks, providing OEM and ODM services for international buyers. The company was established in 2017 and is based in Yongkang, Zhejiang Province, China.

STWADD specializes in vacuum insulated drinkware made from stainless steel (304 and 316 food grade) and BPA-free Tritan plastic. The factory operates advanced automated production lines with a quarterly output exceeding 1 million pieces. Products comply with EU and US food grade standards and are tested by SGS and TUV. The company holds ISO 9001 certification.

## Services

- [OEM Services](https://www.stwadd.com/services.html): Custom mold making, logo printing, laser engraving, water transfer decals, and packaging customization for buyer-specified designs
- [ODM Services](https://www.stwadd.com/services.html): Original design manufacturing with 20+ designers creating 300+ innovative designs annually, many patented
- [Wholesale & Bulk Orders](https://www.stwadd.com/product.html): Flexible MOQ, bulk pricing for distributors and platform sellers
- [One-Stop Procurement](https://www.stwadd.com/services.html): Sourcing and consolidation of Chinese goods for overseas platform buyers beyond drinkware

## Products

- [Stainless Steel Tumblers](https://www.stwadd.com/stainless-steel-tumbler.html): Double wall vacuum insulated tumblers, 12oz to 40oz, with lids
- [Stainless Steel Water Bottles](https://www.stwadd.com/stainless-steel-water-bottle.html): Vacuum insulated bottles for sports, gym, and outdoor use
- [Plastic Water Bottles](https://www.stwadd.com/plastic-water-bottle.html): BPA-free Tritan motivational water bottles with time markers and straws
- [Wine Tumblers](https://www.stwadd.com/vacuum-insulated-tumbler.html): Stainless steel wine tumblers with handles, 12oz and 16oz
- [Hip Flasks](https://www.stwadd.com/hip-flask.html): Stainless steel and copper hip flasks for whiskey and spirits
- [Thermos Bottles](https://www.stwadd.com/thermos-water-bottle.html): LED temperature display smart thermos and traditional thermos bottles
- [Kids Thermos Cups](https://www.stwadd.com/stainless-steel-tumbler.html): 316 food grade stainless steel cartoon thermos for children
- [Silicone Cups](https://www.stwadd.com/silicone-cup.html): Eco-friendly silicone cups and glass bottles

## What We Do Not Do

STWADD explicitly does not provide:
- Retail sales to individual consumers (B2B wholesale only)
- Shipping or logistics services (buyers arrange freight forwarding)
- Product design consulting without manufacturing order
- Food or beverage products
- Services in domestic China market (export-only business)

## Certifications

- ISO 9001 Quality Management System
- SGS product testing and certification
- TUV product testing and certification
- EU food grade compliance
- US FDA food contact material compliance

## Industries

- Promotional products and corporate gifting
- Outdoor and sports retail
- Kitchenware and houseware distribution
- E-commerce platform sellers (Amazon, Walmart, etc.)
- Hospitality and food service
